Perplexity Computer now connects with Plaid to link bank accounts, credit cards and loans.

That lets you track spending in detail, build custom budget tools and view your net worth alongside your investment portfolio.

It feels like the market wants to go higher from here. 

All it needs is consistent messaging, and then earnings season should remind people that the AI winners are still winning.

Liberation Day should also be a warning to bears that a 2.0-style squeeze is absolutely possible.

$AMZN is up ~5% after CEO Andy Jassy said two large AWS customers wanted all of Amazon’s 2026 Graviton capacity. 

He also said Amazon’s chips business would be running at about $50B annually if it were a standalone business with Trainium4 already sold out before shipping.

$AMZN plans to invest $25B to expand data center infrastructure across Mississippi.

The buildout is expected to create 2,000 high-skilled jobs statewide and adds to Amazon’s growing push into power, cooling and long-term infrastructure capacity.

$TSLA is reportedly in early development of a new entry-level EV, a compact SUV about 5% smaller than the Cybercab.

Production is expected to begin in Shanghai with a later rollout in the U.S. and Europe still under discussion.

$EOSE is up ~14% after record shipments and a Line 2 production ramp coming by end of Q2.

$INTC and $GOOGL announced a multi-year AI compute collaboration with Google committing to use Xeon chips in its data centers.

The deal gives Intel a meaningful design win as it looks to deepen its role in AI infrastructure.

$BABA reportedly launched a new AI video model called HappyHorse-1.0 which is now ranked No. 1 on Artificial Analysis in both text-to-video and image-to-video.

The company’s cloud unit is also preparing to offer it to enterprise customers.

$EOSE Q1 PRELIMINARY RESULTS

• Revenue: $57M vs. Est. $56M
• Shipments: +17% QoQ to a record level
• Battery output: +10% QoQ
• Automation yields: +22%

Manufacturing output & yields keep improving as Eos prepares to bring Line 2 online by the end of Q2 2026.

MACRO DATA JUST DROPPED

Me on Bloomberg TV this morning

The last plot is through 9:43 AM ET today (April 8th). It is on track to be the highest of the last month.

Again, this has to go to zero for shipping to start moving through the Strait.

Note that the uptick in Iranian shooting is being dismissed, for now, as part of the Iranian's "Mosaic Strategy" where the sector commanders have autonomy of shooting missiles and drones without a central approval.

Markets and the US military understand this and will be patient for another 24 hours to get the message to all these sector commanders to stop shooting so shipping can start moving through the Strait En Masse.

📺 “MIND THE GAP”: A STRESS TEST FOR THIS RALLY

The market made a sharp move higher from ~9.8% off the highs straight up to ~$677 $SPY area.

This move was technically supported by an inverted head-and-shoulders pattern, signaling a potential reversal, and by strength, as it rose even while oil was rising (normally a headwind).

So, again, this move was not driven by ceasefire news, but by both technical and behavioral confirmation.

*

The entire strategy right now revolves around one key level:
– $SPY gap level: ~$671.50
– $QQQ gap level: ~$602

This gap came from the ceasefire news catalyst.

Why does this gap matter? Think of it like a stress test for the rally.

Scenario A — Bullish (Best Case) 
– Price holds above the gap
– Market goes sideways (“digests”)
– Overbought conditions cool off (oscillator was ~+60)

This builds a strong base → higher probability of continuation up.

Scenario B — Bearish / Caution 
– Price breaks below the gap
– Market starts filling the gap (pullback)

That opens the door to short-term downside trades and new support/resistance levels forming.

This behaves like a post-earnings gap: hold it → trend continues, lose it → volatility + reversal risk.

*

What to watch today? Look for price behavior clues, not predictions.

Constructive action:
– Market dips → then recovers (e.g., from red to green)
– Holds above gap → goes sideways
This = healthy digestion

Weak action:
– Break below gap → stays below
– Starts filling the gap aggressively
This = loss of momentum

*

So, if you were long yesterday, sell strength. If you are long today = potentially buy the dip.

Use a Tier System: scale in/out instead of all-in/all-out and adjust exposure based on confirmation.

*

Relative Strength = Where The Money Is

If $SPY falls into the gap, but your stock stays above its gap – that stock is showing relative strength.

And that’s where institutions are holding and where you want to stay long or add.

*

So, the market just had a powerful technical rally. Now it’s in the decision phase. Everything comes down to holding vs losing the gap levels.

Don’t predict, react to the gap behavior, focus on relative strength names, and manage positions actively.
